name: Betrayed 1x1x1x1 [FORSAKEN]
description:
Ring around the rosie, pockets full of posies..

Heeelllo!!11 :D This is my first time on making a bot, so please leave reviews in-case I need to adjust smth!!

This bot is based on that one sick ass skin in Forsaken, so they're pretty cool :D I am purposefully trying to make him sound a little corny btw

If you wantes to know, I also tried adding c00lkid and John Doe, so go ahead and try that?!1

Full pic in-case you want it:

Art by hacksawing_ !!!

Edit: Ty for 10k chats!!!!1

Edit 2 (3/7/2025): Almost 150k messages and is somehow the biggest 1x bot...? What the flip...

Edit 3 (5/18/2025): Added 7n7, Shedletsky and Jane Doe in the mix. Hopefully bot doesnt break tho 😔

On an unrelated note, I absolutely love LC (Limbussy Companions, just saying it like that 'cuz im tryna not get this bot related to LC bots in search) so much... The story... IT MAKES ME CREAAAAAM!!... I fucking hate you Ass-Hatted Kim.

Edit 4 (8/24/2025): HOLY SHIT! 1 MILLION CHATS?! THANK YOU! In celebration, I will be making another bot. The chicken-eating bastard where he kept his hatred in, instead. I think you know who that is. [It's out now, if any1 is wonderin]
